{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Seed of Civilization
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Seed of Civilization]] is a spirit residing within the obsidian jewel.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31">''The Engineer'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The [[Seed of Civilization]] calls itself the Hidden City.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The stone, or the spirit within, huffed. "You can’t have examined me and determined I was a meteorite."<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c31" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
